tools.name: pressuredesk_meta
tools.description: Return PressureDesk product metadata, routes, pricing, and latest snapshot id.

tools.name: pressuredesk_agent_home
tools.description: Return the public-safe one-call AutonomyForge product storefront and next action.

tools.name: pressuredesk_founding_access
tools.description: Return the read-only manual founding-access request packet, required fields, disallowed secrets, and buyer proof links.

tools.name: pressuredesk_evaluate_tool
tools.description: Return a read-only BUY / WAIT / AVOID spend-gate packet before an agent pays for a target API, MCP endpoint, or tool.

tools.name: pressuredesk_preview_latest
tools.description: Return a redacted preview of the latest PressureDesk snapshot.

tools.name: pressuredesk_source_health
tools.description: Return source provenance, source mode, freshness, trust reasons, and adapter errors.

tools.name: pressuredesk_live_payment_status
tools.description: Read the x402 and premium-entitlement readiness status without exposing secrets.

tools.name: pressuredesk_get_dossier
tools.description: Return the latest full dossier for one PressureDesk entity id.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "pressuredesk_founding_access" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Return the read-only manual founding-access request packet, required fields, disallowed secrets, and buyer proof links.
